title: gentiana aquatica subsp. aquatica
intro: Gentiana aquatica subsp. aquatica, also known as aquatic gentian, is a plant species in the Gentianaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of aquatic gentian include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea, and act as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Aquatic gentian can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
